programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: One of the 20th century's most influential women, Margaret Thatcher smashed through barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. What happened next became the stuff of legend.

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: This action adventure documents the true story of the elite 30 Commando unit, formed during World War II by the man who would later become novelist Ian Fleming, and their risky mission in Norway.

programme.title: Tea with the Dames
programme.desc: Four old friends will reflect on their lives and careers, as they spend a weekend together at the retreat once shared by Joan Plowright and Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: The Professor and the Madman
programme.desc: James Murray begins compiling words for the first edition of the Oxford English Dictionary in the mid 19th century, receiving over 10,000 entries from an asylum patient.

programme.title: A Bump Along The Way
programme.desc: Forty-four-year-old single mother, Pamela, finds herself pregnant after a drunken one-night-stand, leaving her tightly-wound teen daughter, Allegra, ashamed of her deadbeat mum.

programme.title: Dom Hemingway
programme.desc: Dom Hemingway is a larger-than-life safecracker with a loose fuse. Back on the streets of London after twelve years in prison, it's time to collect what he's owed for keeping his mouth shut.

programme.title: Route Irish
programme.desc: A security contractor in Iraq rejects the official explanation of his friend's death and decides to investigate.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: An aged, retired Sherlock Holmes deals with early dementia as he tries to remember both his final case and a mysterious woman whose memory haunts him.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: One night, four cases. Grissom and Brass get a stolen hummer and a taco stand. Warrick gets a dead car show girl. Sara and Greg get a dead bodybuilder. Nick gets a dead boy found on a bench.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Brass travels to Hollywood, California to try to track down his estranged daughter's friend, meanwhile trying to rekindle some kind of relationship with her.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the brutal murder of an inmate at a locked-down state mental hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A man whom Catherine flirted with at a bar reappears in her life as a suspect in a murder investigation of a woman who was shot and killed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Two amorous freshmen are found dead in a sleeping bag in a dorm room, and Sara and Greg run into one dead end after another as they try to determine why the students were killed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI teams come together to save one of their own when they learn one team member has been kidnapped and buried alive, and now they must find him before he suffocates under 5 feet of dirt.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The two forensic teams come back together under the leadership of Grissom and Catherine in time to take on three separate investigations.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofia, Sara and Greg investigate the disappearance of a woman coming home from a night out with a friend after her abandoned car is found on the edge of a highway.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a major Las Vegas player is found dead, Ecklie orders both teams to investigate the case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick, and Warrick investigate a badly mutilated body in the woods.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A serial killer strikes again, and the CSI team tries new technology using evidence from a prior killing.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Greg investigate a wildfire that killed one man and badly burned a woman.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Reunited, the team pieces together the cause of a mysterious explosion at a trailer park, how a stripper ended dead in a street wearing a shopping bag, and how two bodies turned into soup in a trunk.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The pursuit of the American dream leaves a movie star and several immigrant laundry workers dead, in a dark upstairs-downstairs look at the glitter and grime of Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a woman found dead on the staircase in her suburban home. Suspicion quickly falls on the victim's husband, but the blood spatter evidence tells a different story.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: An intruder with a jones for junk food breaks into a residence while a dead body is dumped in the backyard, leading the CSIs to investigate a cult.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick, Warrick, Sara and Greg are sent to eastern Nevada to investigate the disappearance of an entire family.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A single mother is found dead in her home, the apparent victim of suicide. When the evidence points to murder, the team delves into the mysterious past of the woman and her baby.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop turns into a shoot-out through the streets of Vegas, leaving a string of dead bodies including a rookie cop.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Captain Brass and Detective Curtis are haunted by the death of a rookie cop as Grissom and his CSI team continues to investigate the case of a routine traffic stop turned mile-long shoot-out.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A body found in a restaurant dumpster leads Catherine and Brass into the world of competitive eating.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A mother reports her son missing and the investigation quickly focuses on a suspicious man seen in the park. But what appears to be is not, and Catherine finds herself face-to-face with a modern day Medea.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Werewolf in Vegas. The CSIs investigate the killing of a man afflicted with Hypertrichosis, a.k.a. human werewolf syndrome.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a young girl's boyfriend is found dead, the CSIs go after her string of ex-boyfriends and suspicious mother to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a waiter is gunned down at a glitzy Vegas party, the CSIs postulate that the waiter was trying to murder the hostess. And, an ageing Vegas dancer and socialite.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs track down an ex-con who lets his lifetime of crime catch up with him when he tries to settle an old score, accidentally killing an innocent young girl and destroying the new life he had built.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Lady Heather's daughter is found dead, Grissom and the CSI team are led into a twisted world of medical experimentation conducted by a crazed, Nazi-sympathising pseudo-scientist.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A romantic evening ends abruptly when a dead body is found in the chimney of an ageing bachelor's house. Sara, Nick and Brass are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Reality television and the all-too-real world of crime scene investigation combine when a young woman is found drugged and sexually assaulted in the hallway of her high rise apartment building.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a 17-year-old homecoming queen is found dead, wrapped in a shower curtain and dumped on the football field, the CSIs go back to school to search for suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a psychic is murdered at her occult shop, Grissom, Greg and Warrick examine the excessive amount of clues.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When three teenagers are shot to death, when trying to put up posters of their favourite rapper, the team is drawn into the world of hip-hop street gangs and all the violence that goes along with it.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs experience the wedding jitters when they investigate a case in which the mother of the groom is found dead, and tied to the couple's car by her pantyhose.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the assistant of a Hollywood entertainment mogul is murdered during his vacation in Vegas, the CSIs question how the young victim could afford to drive a Ferrari and lodge at a fancy hotel.

programme.desc: When the team finds a woman shot to death in her home, shortly after sleeping with her sexy teenage gardener, the victim's husband reigns as the number one suspect.

programme.desc: While Brass struggles for his life after being shot in the chest, the team investigates the murders of a decapitated victim with a civil war obsession, and a man who killed himself by partying too hard.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs experience the wedding jitters when they investigate a case in which the mother of the groom is found dead, and tied to the couple's car by her pantyhose.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the assistant of a Hollywood entertainment mogul is murdered during his vacation in Vegas, the CSIs question how the young victim could afford to drive a Ferrari and lodge at a fancy hotel.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a psychic is murdered at her occult shop, Grissom, Greg and Warrick examine the excessive amount of clues.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the team finds a woman shot to death in her home, shortly after sleeping with her sexy teenage gardener, the victim's husband reigns as the number one suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When an unidentified woman is found dead on the set of the famous show Ka by Cirque Du Soleil, the CSI must study the inner workings of the show to find out what happened.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine, at first trying to hide the fact that she might have been raped, realises that someone is targeting her and her family when her daughter gets kidnapped.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The deceased victims in the CSI coroner's office give voice to their own murder investigations for the first time.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the case of a woman found dead in a church.

programme.desc: Keppler finds himself having recurring nightmares about an incident many years ago in New Jersey, which get worse when a friend of his comes to town.

programme.desc: Grissom is shocked when he opens a package sent to him while he was on sabbatical and finds a miniature crime scene inside.

programme.desc: Grissom and his team are discouraged when they find a pool of blood as they begin investigating the disappearance of a high school basketball star and his cheerleader girlfriend.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Six showgirls are murdered in their rented house and Sara is haunted by the dying words of the last victim, as she dies in Sara's arms.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a thug gunned down in a limo, the CSI team discovers that the case has ties to the brother of the man Greg killed in self-defense.

programme.desc: Grissom sends the team out with new cases and goes to spend the evening in autopsy.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: In their attempt to identify the murderer of a has-been boxer who lived among a group of prostitutes who detested him, the team must establish what actually killed him.

programme.desc: During a shootout with the police, a suspect in the kidnapping and possible murder of a blackjack dealer and her husband takes his own life.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos

programme.desc: In 1979, in Las Vegas, 16-year-old student Kim Bryant is last seen outside a restaurant. Three weeks later, her body is discovered by three teenage boys hiking on the outskirts of town.

programme.sub-title: The Girl In The River Part 2

programme.sub-title: The Serial Killer Who Only Killed Once
programme.desc: Just before Thanksgiving 1994, a killer slays Robin at home while her child is asleep. A relentless investigation circles her husband.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Natalia Grace
programme.desc: Natalia seeks refuge with Vince and Nicole DePaul to escape the grip of her manipulative adoptive parents, Cynthia and Antwon Mans.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil
programme.desc: In 1994, an elementary school principal is found tied to a tree outside Oklahoma City, launching a nationwide manhunt for Franklin Delano Floyd.

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: Adult film star Timothy Boham's secret double life leads to murder.

programme.title: Murder Under the Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, NFL player and former high school football star Darrent Williams is at a party. Soon after midnight, he's shot dead.

programme.title: Boy Band Confidential: Hollywood Demons
programme.desc: At the end of the '90s boy band frenzy, music managers promise a new wave of young men a shot at fame but behind the scenes loom alleged predators.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills
programme.sub-title: The Doctor Will See You Now

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The remaining chefs from Scotland compete over dishes inspired by 2024's Olympics and Paralympics in Paris, but when the chefs are this close, who will win and who must go home?

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: Final bakers compete, creating their Signature high tea, a difficult Technical Terrine set by Maggie Beer, and for their final Showstopper a 3D Illusion Cake.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: In the signature challenge, the bakers are once again butter-bashing and folding their pastry to achieve perfect lamination for a difficult French pastry.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: Bakers bring magic to the tent with elevated fairy bread, sugar plum cookies sandwiched with jam and ricotta, and an edible pop up story book made from cake and cookies.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Seafood Lovers' Guide
programme.desc: Cromer is famed for its small, sweet, succulent crabs. Rick joins the crab fishermen to lift the pots then cooks a simple but effective dish by baking the crabmeat in its shell.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Seafood Lovers' Guide
programme.desc: In Ireland, Rick's first stop is a remote seafood restaurant on Bere Island, where the larder is just over the harbour wall. Shellfish - crabs are hauled out of the sea to order.

programme.title: Food Safari
programme.desc: Food Safari explores the nourishing foods of Egypt as Maeve discovers their favourite dishes. We meet Ramy Megalaa, chef and restaurateur, who introduces Maeve to the key ingredients in Egyptian cooking.

programme.title: Food Safari
programme.desc: First chef Detlef Haupt reveals the essential ingredients in traditional German cooking and later prepares one of his favourite dishes, sauerbraten served with potato dumplings and tasty cabbage.

programme.title: Gino's Italy: Like Mamma Used to Make
programme.desc: There's more to Tuscany than Chianti as Gino reveals a very different side of this much visited region, one that is steeped in medieval heritage and its linked culinary customs.

programme.title: Jamie's Quick & Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie's cooking up his quick Asian fish cakes, with a brilliant tip for a sweet and spicy glaze, then his speedy lemony courgette linguine.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Love To Cook
programme.desc: Even though she's queen of the kitchen, Mary Berry spends just as much time in the garden, growing ingredients for her delicious dishes packed with fruit and vegetables.

programme.title: Eat Well For Less
programme.desc: Can Chris and Jordan help a family with different tastes come together at mealtimes and get them eating more fruit and veg, fewer snacks and one meal for all, plus save them money?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The judges are joined by one of Britain's most decorated Olympians to decide Scotland's winner. With dishes celebrating the Olympics and Paralympics, who will get through?

programme.title: Cook Clever, Waste Less with Prue & Rupy
programme.desc: NHS doctors Preeti and Sanjeev in Manchester are struggling to juggle their hectic work lives and the multiple meal demands of their three children.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life
programme.desc: Paul heads for Cyprus, where he lived for six years. He's reunited with friends and makes a classic ham and cheese croissant, baklava, spanakopita, and a Cypriot village bread.

programme.desc: Mary Berry loves to explore new ideas that inspire her to make stand-out dishes that really tantalise the tastebuds.

programme.desc: Jamie's cooking up his tender lamb shoulder, an epic sharing feast that's super quick to prep, with an easy cheat for incredible flavour.

programme.desc: Jamie's cooking up his high-speed ginger shakin' beef, teamed with one-minute-wonder veg, pak choi. Followed by crispy squid and smashed avo.

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On

programme.desc: Kev the crab man takes Justine out to collect crabs and they have a cook off, you decide whose crabs look better. She also prepares barramundi in Port Douglas and heads to Tallebudgera Beach.

programme.desc: An experiment to create a perfect human produced not one, but two twins in mismatched shapes. They set off on a comic adventure to find their mother.

programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.desc: Back in a new globe-trotting adventure, the Soviets kidnap Indiana in Mexico as they plot to harness the power of the Crystal Skull of Akator in the Cold War.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: A Special Operations veteran is now into peace, serenity and non-violence. But when Trautman is held by the Soviets and interrogated, the CIA can do nothing and Rambo must come to his aid.

programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.desc: Wealthy hunters pay for the right to stalk and kill the most challenging prey of them all: man.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer bonds with a caddy who sharpens his golf game. George's bosses eye a promotion when they think he works earlier and later than everyone.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine strains her neck reaching for a bike, then offers it to whoever fixes her. Susan's cousin gives her baby the name George had saved for his first child.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry surprises his parents by buying them a new car. George reconsiders his engagement when a friend of Elaine tells him that she could have set him up with actress Marisa Tomei.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's fixation on Marisa alarms Susan. Elaine rings Jerry in Florida wanting to join him. Elaine gets Marisa's number so George can claim an alibi.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Pre trip tests show traces of opium, so Peterman fires Elaine. Jerry's parents linger in New York while waiting to move back to Florida.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Susan's old roommate hands Jerry a package, and he misplaces his own. Frank turns George's room into a billiard room.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is happy because his wedding is delayed three months and excited because Jerry is going to go out with Susan's best friend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry uses Elaine to prove a clerk wrong about an expensive jacket, and the clerk asks her out. George hosts an unwanted wig master from a Broadway musical.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Sharing a calzone makes George Steinbrenner's pet. Kramer raves about clothes straight from the dryer. Jerry thinks Elaine's boyfriend is dating her without asking.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George doesn't hear the details on a project that Wilhelm wants him to champion. Peterman wants Elaine to bid on some golf clubs at an auction and gets into a bidding war.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Wilhelm is delighted with the job George did on the project. The detective on the case thinks he's found Jerry's car, damaged beyond recognition.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After George's off hand remark, Jerry and Elaine await a couple's split. Elaine debuts a new hairdo and resumes driving, which makes Jerry carsick.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: With the wedding nearing, George and Susan order invitations. Jerry meets Jeannie, his female counterpart, after nearly geting hit by a car..

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George tries to put Susan behind him, Elaine is given control of J Peterman's business.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is suspected of killing his own fiancee, while Kramer falls for Jerry's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine meets three friends who are the exact opposite of Jerry, George and Kramer. Then, George uses Susan's death to attract women.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's strange dancing kills staff respect. George cultivates a bad boy image. Jerry becomes an underground legend after bootlegging a new movie.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George tries to woo a photo clerk with pictures of himself. Elaine's reputation blocks treatment. Kramer offers to secure a refund for Jerry's busted stereo.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's promotion of a mail room clerk sparks a mutiny, Jerry discovers his girlfriend's mother is dating Bania, and Kramer brings Frank out of retirement to cook.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's fame in Japan endears Kramer to a group of tourists and inspires George to revive their TV pilot.

programme.desc: As a restaurant's bright lights keep Kramer awake, Elaine's job is threatened after she buys George an expensive hat on the company's account.

programme.desc: While abstinence makes George smarter, it has the opposite effect on Elaine. Kramer opens a smoker's lounge in his apartment as Jerry prepares to speak at a junior high school.

programme.desc: George squares off against a shipwreck survivor over a new apartment. Meanwhile, Jerry attempts to help Newman get a much sought-after transfer to Hawaii.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: In order to avoid attending another musical with Cheryl, Jim finds a gay man to accompany her.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl throws Jim an unwanted surprise party for his 50th birthday. He sabotages her efforts, later revealing the reason why he won't celebrate his birthday.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim is dismayed to learn that Cheryl has joined a dinner party club. When he grumbles that he'd like to meet the moron who invented women, God suddenly appears to defend himself.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Eager to get over Charlotte, Frasier takes a trip to the local singles bar. Meanwhile, Ronee tries to hide the fact that she spent the night with Martin from her mother. Niles develops a craving for fast food.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Determined to win Charlotte's heart, Frasier plots his strategy for wooing her away from her boyfriend Frank. Back at Frasier's place, Martin shows off the engagement ring he plans to give Ronee.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A road trip takes Frasier and Charlotte off the beaten path, and a series of misunderstandings turn three job interviews into a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A determined prostitute pursues Harry, much to Lana's disapproval.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan is infuriated when he discovers his attractive assistant is dating other men - including Harry and Bull.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Lana's prescribed medication for a virus results in changed behavior - and it is Harry who must deal with her overactive libido.

programme.title: The Nanny

programme.desc: George heads to the south coast to meet an eccentric father and son duo, who plan to convert an oil rig escape boat into a comfortable floating holiday home. But without fixed plans, will they sink or swim?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil and Kirstie hit the capital to help a young family and a pair of first-time buyers get a slice of the London property pie in and around Archway and Holloway and West Hampstead.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil is beside the seaside, while Kirstie is covering the countryside as they take on the Norfolk property market searching for homes for two sets of house-hunters.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are in urban east London and the rural Essex countryside, helping two couples who know exactly what they want and are not afraid to say it.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie catches up with vicar Ian and his wife Peta from East London. Phil revisits Ben and Lucy in South London.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura helps Nadine, who's moving to Spain with her husband Tyler, and best friend Jannette find the perfect home on Costa Calida.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Complicated Search For The Simple Life In Costa Rica
programme.desc: A young Canadian leaves Montreal for a simpler, more spiritual life in Costa Rica, but soon learns her big expectations may be harder to realise than she thought.

programme.title: Clean It, Fix It
programme.desc: The Clean It Fix It team are helping Grandmother Maura revamp her messy lounge. In just 24 hours, they build a birdwatching area for her grandchildren and give the living room a new identity.

programme.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programme.desc: A car accident injury leaves Becca and Cory coping with their home's accessibility issues. Can Jillian fix the function of the space, or will Todd find them a rancher with a view to inspire a move?

programme.title: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: With three girls under the age of 10, Kylah and Jon have been too busy to move, but they desperately need a bigger house.

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: Married and eager to start a family, Nicole and Colby are hoping to find a picture-perfect dog-friendly home where they can put down roots.

programme.title: Tough Love with Hilary Farr
programme.desc: A woman isn't ready to move into her partner's home until his ex-wife's designs are gone, but a tricky floor plan is keeping them apart for longer than they'd like.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.sub-title: A Grand Makeover Meets The Marrs
programme.desc: A ballroom-dancing California couple is ready for a renovation and for the Marrs, it's their unique home yet. Dave and Jenny take on the project as they aim to create a bathroom spa retreat.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A retired firefighter wins big and seeks a bachelor pad in Florida's Lakeland region. David joins the hunt for the perfect home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A New Yorker with a $5 million win wants a lakefront cottage to enjoy with friends. David steps in with some perfect options.

programme.title: Wild Homes with George Clarke
programme.desc: George Clarke sails to Kawau Island near Auckland. He visits an architecturally designed boathouse, a timber home, a clifftop yurt and a classic Kiwi bach.

programme.desc: Episode 3 of this series on COP30 in Brazil looks at AMOC, an ocean current in the Atlantic. It transports warm water to the north, but melting ice threatens to stop it entirely.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Oku-Izumo is home to an ancient technique for making the steel used in Japanese swords. We meet a blacksmith who has inherited the tradition, and enjoy local scenery presented in time-lapse images.

programme.desc: Inoue Hiroko is the president of an NGO that has been running exchange programs for young people from Israel, Palestine, and Japan for 20 years. She talks about their goals and her hope for peace.

programme.title: MATSURI: The Heartbeat of Japan
programme.desc: Gojinjo Taiko is a wild, powerful performance by masked drummers. It originated 400 years ago, when villagers disguised themselves as oni (demons) to scare away a warlord's army.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: Workers at a sawmill use the latest tools and their honed skills to prepare the building blocks of Edo life: long, narrow beams, bamboo stems and leftover wood stacked as high as buildings.

programme.desc: Erfurt, a city in Thuringia near the center of Germany, traces its roots back to the 8th century. By the 11th century, it had developed into a major crossroads uniting trade and culture across Europe.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Ramen Japan
programme.desc: In the birthplace of tonkotsu ramen, we visit a long-standing shop specializing in the Kurume style. Learn the surprising story of this cloudy pork-bone broth ramen from those who love it best.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Kyo-kanoko Shibori, untying the beauty bound within. Dive deep into the ancient capital, still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical, effective workplace expressions, understand business culture and improve your kanji.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Fish that overconsume seaweed, often called pests. A strong odor also makes them hard to sell. Kanazawa Ryuji uses these to make a distinctive fish sauce, so that no life from the sea goes to waste.

programme.title: Documentary 360
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN's flagship documentary series offers must-see episodes on politics, the economy, social trends, science and the environment in Japan and beyond.

programme.title: NHK WORLD TV Special Program
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programs from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: 1/100: Men Who Took Parental Leave
programme.desc: Only one in seven fathers take parental leave in Japan, mostly only for under two weeks. This episode follows a man who took a full year off to raise two children, revealing a slice of modern Japan.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Anime Manga Explosion
programme.desc: ANIME MANGA EXPLOSION features major Japanese anime and manga works that are highly recognized by international fans. Each episode explores the secrets of the works' popularity.

programme.title: Kids Edutainment
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a variety of programs focusing on Japan.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Japan's exciting music scene! Pop, rock, traditional and more! Live performances, artist interviews, plus all the latest news.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-4.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Five-minute shows presenting the limitless, kaleidoscopic appeal of Japanese culture, traditions, and lifestyles in sushi-sized helpings.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: On this unique trip around Japan, discover the lesser-known charms and customs of regions through the eyes of cats! Filmed by wildlife photographe,Iwago Mitsuaki.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World

programme.title: Clothing That Protects
programme.desc: Morinaga Kunihiko (Fashion designer)visits Amami Oshima, Kagoshima. Priestesses on Amami wore patchwork robes with triangular butterfly designs, intended to protect the wearer from unseen spirits.

programme.title: Hit Replay
programme.desc: The best radio hits and throwbacks.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: Chan Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, months after the first film, Ming suspects a superintendent is a triad mole, while years earlier, Yan undertakes his first mission. (Subtitles).

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: An employee of a floral shop hangs himself when a colleague goes to his apartment to investigate his absence from work.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: An aspiring writer is sexually abused and left for dead by four men. She systematically hunts them down to seek revenge, inflicting upon them every horrifying and torturous moment they carried out on her.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Amulet
programme.desc: An ex-soldier is offered a place to stay at a decaying house inhabited by a young woman and her dying mother. Falling for her, he suspects something sinister is going on.

programme.title: Suspiria
programme.desc: A girl enrols in an upmarket ballet academy, only to realise that the school is a front for something much more sinister and supernatural.

programme.title: The Science of Sleep
programme.desc: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is love-struck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: A bedridden stuntman entrances a little girl with tales of exotic heroes. As his health reaches the point of peril so does the story he's telling, with dramatic consequences. An epic fantasy.

programme.title: Color Out Of Space
programme.desc: A family's retreat to rural life quickly crumbles when a meteorite crashes into their front yard. They attempt to battle a nebulous entity that they can barely understand.

programme.title: District B13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: District B13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Explosive sequel set in a futuristic Paris. Corrupt cops conspire to launch a nuclear strike and take over a ghetto terrorised by marauding drug gangs and killers. Subtitles.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: Howling IV: The Original Nightmare
programme.desc: A successful author moves to a small town after suffering a mental breakdown and is tormented by demons and werewolves.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Coming Home In The Dark
programme.desc: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

programme.title: House of the Devil
programme.desc: Financially struggling college student Samantha takes a strange babysitting job that coincides with a full lunar eclipse. She slowly realizes her clients harbor a terrifying secret.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: A young London writer follows strangers for inspiration, but his hobby becomes an obsession, leading him further into their lives than he ever intended.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: A group of elite hunters pay to hunt down a man on a deserted island, only to find themselves becoming the prey.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl returns home from camp and learns her mother has a new boyfriend, one she intends to marry; a man whose charm, intelligence and beauty make him look like he's not human at all.

programme.title: The Wild Goose Lake
programme.desc: On the run, gangster Zhou connects with sex worker Liu Aiai who was instructed to bring him in.

programme.title: Hellraiser IV: Bloodline
programme.desc: In the 22nd century, a scientist attempts to right the wrong his ancestor created: the puzzle box that opens the gates of Hell and unleashes Pinhead and his Cenobite legions.

programme.title: Howling V: The Rebirth
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: Hell House LLC
programme.desc: Five years after 15 people were killed during a haunted house tour, a documentary crew visits the scene to investigate what really happened.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: Lizzy is settling a remote stretch of land on the 19th-century American frontier, when she begins to sense a sinister presence that seems to be borne of the land itself.

programme.title: The Holy Mountain
programme.desc: A Mexican master (Alexandro Jodorowsky) leads a Christ figure (Horacio Salinas) and other disciples to a mountain of immortal wise men.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: When dangerous criminals on a cargo ship are transported from the Phillipines to South Korea, they unleash a sinister force after an escape attempt leads to a riot. (Subtitles)

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: Chen Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: Eaten Alive
programme.desc: Psychotic redneck Judd owns a dilapidated hotel in rural Texas, where he murders people and then feeds their remains to his large pet crocodile in the swamp beside his hotel.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Billy Warlock) discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: A failed drug deal lands petty criminal Frank in debt to a ruthless Copenhagen drug lord. Mads Mikkelsen stars in a gritty and violent crime film.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: The death of a ex-lover puts a French cop on a collision course with the Yakuza and the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Upstream Color
programme.desc: A woman is abducted and hypnotised with an organic material harvested from a specific flower. When she falls for a man, the two realise he may also have been subjected to the same process.

programme.title: Puppet Master II
programme.desc: The malicious marionettes are back to resurrect their dead master and evict parapsychologists from the family estate.

programme.title: Hell House LLC II: The Abbadon Hotel
programme.desc: Eight years after a hotel's tragic opening, an investigative journalist is convinced key evidence remains in the abandoned hotel.

programme.title: A Tale of Two Sisters
programme.desc: On returning home from a mental health facility, two sisters find that, along with their stepmother, they have to find a way to deal with their late mother's ghost who begins to haunt them.

programme.title: I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: The line between good and evil begins to blur when a special agent goes on the hunt for a serial killer who brutally murdered his pregnant fiancee.

programme.title: Cops vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Pusher 2: With Blood on My Hands
programme.desc: In part two of Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy, Mads Mikkelsen plays Tonny, a criminal at the mercy of his cold-hearted gangster father.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: A hit man is sent to Spain to kidnap an ex-criminal and transport him to Paris for execution.

programme.title: Come To Daddy
programme.desc: Norval, a privileged man-child travels to the beautiful and remote cabin of his estranged father, in order to reconnect with him as he hasn't seen him in 30 years.

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve
programme.desc: On Halloween, a babysitter finds an old VHS tape in the kids' trick or treat bag. The tape features three tales of terror, all linked together by a murderous clown.

programme.title: Puppet Master III: Toulon's Revenge
programme.desc: Gestapo agents face killer dolls when they murder puppeteer Toulon's wife in this prequel to "Puppet Master".

programme.title: Hell House LLC III: Lake Of Fire
programme.desc: The Abaddon Hotel will once again be open to the public. Russell Wynn has taken his audience-interactive show, Insomnia, into the abandoned hotel that is rumored to be haunted.

programme.title: Noroi: The Curse
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist named Kobayashi goes missing shortly after completing a documentary. What begins as an investigation into strange noises soon evolves into the chilling mystery of a demonic entity.

programme.title: Sator
programme.desc: Secluded in a desolate forest, a broken family is observed by the demon Sator who is attempting to claim them.

programme.title: Synchronic
programme.desc: Two New Orleans paramedics' lives are ripped apart after they encounter a series of horrific deaths linked to a designer drug with bizarre, other-worldly effects.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A reluctant IRA agent discovers that some people just aren't who you expect them to be.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: Every day, 20,000 passengers enter Canada through Vancouver Airport. Phoney tourists, drug toys, aggressive visitors and weapon-phones keep security on constant alert.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Frank desperately searches for his missing wife, while Claire tries to come to terms with her new marriage. Claire is faced with an emotional quandary as a life-altering opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and the Highlanders rescue Claire from Black Jack Randall. Back at the castle, politics threaten to tear Clan MacKenzie apart and Jamie's scorned lover, Laoghaire, attempts to win him back.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.sub-title: By The Pricking Of My Thumbs
programme.desc: Jamie hopes the newly arrived Duke of Sandringham will help lift the price from his head, while Claire attempts to save an abandoned child.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Geillis are on trial for witchcraft, while Jamie manages to rescue Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Claire and Jamie make their way to Lallybroch, Jamie's family home.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie finds himself between a rock and a hard place when a redcoat deserter from his past resurfaces.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jenny set out to rescue Jaime from his redcoat captors. However, when Murtagh joins up, they turn to unorthodox tactics to send word to Jaime.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jaime awaits his death sentence at Wentworth Prison, while Claire and the Highlanders search for a rescue plan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jaime, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire must reconcile her future with the life and love she left behind. Shifting back to 18th century, Jamie, Claire, and Murtagh arrive on the shores of France.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Life in Paris is not without its trials as Jamie struggles to triumph over the traumas of his past.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie's days and nights are dominated by political machinations, while Claire finds solace in her healing skills.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie throw an elaborate dinner party intended to derail investors in Prince Charles' war effort. Meanwhile, Claire reveals to Jamie that Jack Randall is alive.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Jamie and Claire attempt to extinguish the fires their dinner party ignited but their relationship is put to the ultimate test when the past rears its ugly head.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire devise a scheme to stop a wine deal which could fill the Prince's war chest. When Claire learns Jamie has gone back on his word, the couple are met with dire consequences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is brought to L'Hopital Des Anges where doctors try to save her life and that of her unborn baby. King Louis asks Claire to judge two men accused of practising the dark arts - one an enemy, one a friend.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie call upon Jamie's grandsire, Lord Lovat, in an attempt to elicit support for the Jacobite cause.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men during training. Meanwhile, an Englishman arrives in camp with new information.

programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men during training. Meanwhile, an Englishman arrives in camp with new information.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of 'history', Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie puts all of his efforts into turning the Jacobite army away from the impending slaughter at Culloden Moor, Claire attempts to comfort the sick Alex Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Flashing forward to 1968, Claire reveals the truth about her parentage to her daughter. Back in the 18th century, the day of the Battle of Culloden has arrived.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie is at the mercy of British victors, until his past provides his only hope of survival. Meanwhile, Claire attempts to adjust to life in 1940s Boston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie leads a lonely life until Lallybroch is threatened by redcoats pursing the elusive Jacobite traitor. In Boston, Claire and Frank struggle to co-exist in a marriage haunted by the ghost of Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden and has the power to make his life hell. Claire and Frank both put their best foot forward in marriage.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While serving as a groomsman at Helwater, Jamie is pulled into the intrigue of a British family. In 1968, Claire, Brianna and Roger struggle to trace Jamie's whereabouts.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna grapples with life-changing revelations and Claire must help her come to terms with the fact that she is her father's daughter. Roger brings news that forces Claire and Brianna to face a choice.

programme.desc: After decades apart, Jamie and Claire finally reunite and rekindle their emotional and physical bonds, but Jamie's new business dealings jeopardise the couple's hopes for a simple life together.

programme.desc: Claire follows her conscience as a surgeon, even though it could put her and Jamie's lives at risk. Jamie attempts to evade the reach of the Crown as its representative closes in on his illegal dealings.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire returns to Lallybroch with Jamie, where she does not receive quite the reception she was expecting. Unbeknown to her, Jamie's made some choices in their time apart which come back to haunt them.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie leave Scotland, sailing to the West Indies on an urgent quest. When the superstitious crew looks for someone to blame after a string of bad luck, rescue comes from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire races to discover the source of an epidemic aboard a disease-stricken ship. Jamie locks horns with Captain Raines. Fergus finds himself torn between loyalty and love.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After a leap of faith, Claire washes up on an island where survival is her only option. Navigating treacherous waters cripples the Artemis, so Jamie devises a joyful moment for his crew in the midst of setbacks.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Artemis finally reaches Jamaica, bringing Jamie and Claire closer to their goal. During a ball on the island, the Fraser's encounter old allies and former adversaries who threaten to derail their mission.

programme.desc: Claire is forced to play a game of cat and mouse with an old adversary as she searches for Young Ian. The Frasers race through the jungles of Jamaica to prevent the unthinkable.

programme.desc: Claire returns to Lallybroch with Jamie, where she does not receive quite the reception she was expecting. Unbeknown to her, Jamie's made some choices in their time apart which come back to haunt them.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie leave Scotland, sailing to the West Indies on an urgent quest. When the superstitious crew looks for someone to blame after a string of bad luck, rescue comes from an unlikely source.

programme.desc: Claire races to discover the source of an epidemic aboard a disease-stricken ship. Jamie locks horns with Captain Raines. Fergus finds himself torn between loyalty and love.

programme.desc: Natural wellness solutions designed to nourish and soothe while restoring balance. From botanical remedies to holistic care. Every product supports a healthier and more mindful lifestyle.

programme.title: Premium Tanzanite Gems
programme.desc: Experience the allure of Tanzanite, a rare gemstone with a captivating purple-blue hue. Discover its beauty when paired with sparkling diamonds and luxurious Rose or Yellow Gold settings.

programme.title: NEW Winnie's Picks
programme.desc: See it, love it, COLLECT it! From muscle cars to sporting stars, figurines to footy teams, we ve got Collectables that pay homage to your passion and celebrate its honour forever.

programme.title: Carla Oates The Beauty Chef
programme.desc: Watch Carla in the kitchen whipping up certified organic and naturally fermented superfood blends - a powerhouse of nutrients and healthy bacteria. Beauty begins in the belly for radiant skin.

programme.title: Bella Bodies Intimates
programme.desc: Transform with this revolutionary shapewear. Australia's best-kept secret offers affordable and glamorous solutions for instant firmness and beauty. Discover new confidence today.

programme.title: Sunday Night Jewellery!
programme.desc: Don't miss these stunning designs and dazzling gems as they take centre stage. Discover exclusive pieces with expert insights and timeless elegance in this sparkling show.

programme.title: Two-T's Fashion
programme.desc: Refresh your wardrobe with Two-T's Fashion. Effortless everyday style meets flattering fits and quality fabrics made for women who value comfort and confidence with a polished look.

programme.title: Maestro Air Purifier
programme.desc: Enjoy fresh, clean air with this intelligent air purifier.Eliminate airborne particles quietly and efficiently. Compact and portable for every room. It???s pure comfort you can breathe in.

programme.title: Good Morning TVSN
programme.desc: Kick off your mornings with TVSN. Watch as we showcase hot products with special sneak peeks and lively competitions. Catch vibrant and engaging mornings with us here at TVSN!

programme.title: My Hair Doctor
programme.desc: Crafted by hairdresser and trichologist Guy Parsons. This specially formulated collection features handpicked botanicals and scientifically proven ingredients for optimal hair and scalp care.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: When a nasty stomach bug sweeps through Portwenn, Martin takes to the radio to alert residents to the danger, with unforeseen consequences.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the award-winning comedy panel show, with Lee Mack and David Mitchell returning as the lightning-quick team captains.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig talks through a tantalising trunkful of 'T' topics, with Jo Brand, Sally Phillips, Guz Khan, and Alan Davies.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are Bob Mortimer, Gabby Logan, Katherine Parkinson and Steve Backshall.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
